name: llm-cli-decompose
description: Planner class in src/horse_fish/planner/decompose.py shells out to runtime CLIs (claude/copilot/pi/opencode) using asyncio.create_subprocess_exec with --print flag to get non-interactive JSON output. CLI arg patterns: claude uses -m, copilot/pi use --model, opencode uses -m. Response parsing handles markdown code fences via regex before json.loads(). Subtask objects constructed directly (not via Subtask.create()) to support deps and files_hint fields from LLM response.
